title: Project Telos Fourth-Wave Measurement Gate And Negative Fixture Claims

claims.text: A UTF-8 Telos measurement packet containing the five Crucible-supported layer types passes crucible measurement-gate with MATCH, decision_outcome allow, and five matched rows.
claims.falsification: The positive packet is missing, cannot be parsed as UTF-8 JSON, or crucible measurement-gate does not return MATCH/allow with five matched rows.

claims.text: The same measurement packet fails closed under a bad explicit histogram criterion, returning UNVERIFIABLE, decision_outcome block, and pixel_dimensions_mismatch.
claims.falsification: The negative criteria file is missing, the negative gate returns MATCH/allow, or the histogram row does not report pixel_dimensions_mismatch.

claims.text: Learn rejects a proof packet with illegal verdict enum VERIFIED_SUPREME, exits nonzero, and writes no prooflesson receipt.
claims.falsification: Learn accepts the forged packet, exits 0, or writes a prooflesson receipt.

claims.text: The fourth-wave package distinguishes the five currently Crucible-gated measurement layers from Telos's broader ten-layer measurement bus.
claims.falsification: The docs claim all ten Telos measurement layers are currently accepted by crucible measurement-gate.

claims.text: The fourth-wave content queue packages both positive and negative evidence for the parallel posting session.
claims.falsification: The content queue omits either the positive measurement-gate result or the negative fixture result.
